ddls:
CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "port" INTEGER /* Port number the server is operating on */,
  "player_count" INTEGER /* Current number of players online */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum player capacity of the server */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the server (e.g., Online, Offline) */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game that the server is running */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the server */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* Timestamp of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "server_load" REAL /* Current load on the server */,
  "uptime" REAL /* Total uptime of the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., PvP, Survival) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required to start the game */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players the game can support */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode (e.g., Solo, Team) */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_games" (
  "server_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server-game relation */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server hosting the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game hosted on the server */,
  "game_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the game started */,
  "game_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the game ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_games_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_tags" (
  "server_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server-tag relation */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server associated with the tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_tags_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the admin */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., server manager, support) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the admin */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_admins" (
  "server_admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server-admin relation */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server managed by the admin */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin managing the server */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the admin was assigned to the server */,
  "last_action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last action performed by the admin on the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_admins_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_admins_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server associated with the log entry */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event logged */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., server start, update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who performed the action */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., Info, Warning, Error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_logs_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_server_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the player is connected to */,
  "join_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player joined */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "total_play_time" REAL /* Total play time of the player in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the stats are associated with */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server where the game was played */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Total number of kills made by the player */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths of the player */,
  "last_game_date" TEXT /* Date of the last game played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_players" INTEGER /* Total number of players for the day */,
  "average_play_time" REAL /* Average playtime of players for the day in hours */,
  "peak_player_count" INTEGER /* Peak number of players on a given day */,
  "total_play_time" REAL /* Total play time of all players on a given day in hours */,
  "server_load" REAL /* Average server load on a given day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)
